overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit commercial district. The player traverses covered arcades, narrow steam-filled alleys, and ascends to the famous Afterlife club entrance, showcasing the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with teal and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with neon-lit storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered commercial walkway, passing by the Snapped Synapse roasters shop on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead in the same direction
group of pedestrians walking away from camera toward the arcade exit

entered.detail: large overhead concrete and metal structure with red truss beams providing cover
corner shop with bright teal neon signage and shuttered windows
large cylindrical columns painted teal supporting the overhead structure
storefront with illuminated MARK 24 signage and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial arcade with distinctive teal support pillars and red overhead truss beams. The player walks past the Snapped Synapse roasters shop with its bright teal neon signage, then continues toward the MARK 24 store. Several NPC pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, creating a moderate crowd density in this sheltered urban walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor approaching service alley entrance

events.description: approaching the entrance to a narrow service alley with metal flooring and steam vents

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway and approaching the narrow alley entrance ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the alley entrance

entered.detail: dark opening leading to narrow service corridor with visible steam
bright yellow automated vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the arcade as the environment transitions toward a narrower service corridor. The MARK 24 store remains visible to the left while the path ahead leads to a dark alley entrance with visible steam. The crowd thins out as the player approaches the more industrial back-area of the district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service alley with steam vents and neon floor lighting

events.description: enters the narrow steam-filled service alley with metal grate flooring and cyan neon strips
exits the narrow alley into a wider street with steam vents and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow industrial alley, navigating past steam vents and over metal flooring with embedded neon strips

entered.detail: tight concrete walls with industrial piping and graffiti
metal catwalk floor with glowing cyan neon strips running down the center
ground-level vents emitting thick white steam clouds
exposed ventilation ducts and pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, enclosed service alley devoid of pedestrians. The environment features industrial metal grate flooring with embedded cyan neon strips, steam vents creating atmospheric fog, and graffiti-covered walls. The space feels confined and utilitarian compared to the commercial arcade, with exposed piping overhead and debris scattered on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit back street with steam vents and stairway entrance

events.description: approaches and enters the stairwell entrance leading to the Afterlife club

agents.ego_description: walking along the steamy back street, passing neon purple storefronts and approaching a stairwell entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the yellow vending machine

entered.detail: building facade with bright magenta and purple neon tube lighting
ground vents emitting steam across the wet reflective pavement
dark opening with concrete stairs leading upward, marked by green lighting
standard traffic signal visible at the street intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the scene opens to a wider back street with wet reflective pavement and active steam vents. The player passes by a storefront with vivid purple neon lighting and a yellow vending machine. Sparse pedestrian activity is visible as the player approaches a stairwell entrance marked by green neon lights, leading up to the Afterlife club.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete stairwell leading to Afterlife club entrance

events.description: enters the dimly lit stairwell with green ambient neon lighting
reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the Afterlife club entrance

agents.ego_description: ascending the concrete stairwell toward the Afterlife club entrance, passing green neon tube lights and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: narrow concrete staircase with metal railings and worn steps
horizontal green fluorescent tube mounted on the wall
large illuminated sign reading AFTERLIFE in green neon letters above the entrance
closed metal security grating on the right side of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a dark, enclosed concrete stairwell illuminated by sparse green neon tube lights. The player ascends the stairs, passing graffiti and posters on the walls, until reaching the top where the iconic green neon AFTERLIFE sign becomes visible, marking the entrance to the famous Night City club. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric, contrasting with the open streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit commercial arcade into a secluded and atmospheric industrial alleyway. It begins by moving through a sheltered walkway characterized by teal support pillars and red overhead beams, passing the bright signage of the Snapped Synapse roasters and the MARK 24 store amidst a moderate crowd of pedestrians. As the player continues forward, the environment transitions from the open shopping area toward a narrower service corridor where the crowd thins and the path leads toward a dark, steam-filled entrance. The scene then shifts fully into a confined service alley, leaving the commercial district behind for a utilitarian space of metal grate flooring and embedded cyan neon strips. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this enclosed corridor, surrounded by graffiti-covered walls, exposed overhead piping, and drifting steam vents.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban back street into the claustrophobic, neon-lit ascent toward a legendary club. It begins by exiting a narrow alley onto a wider street where wet pavement reflects vivid purple neon and steam rises from active vents. As the camera passes a yellow vending machine and sparse pedestrians, the open city environment shifts toward a stairwell entrance marked by glowing green lights. The scene then transitions into a dark, enclosed concrete stairwell, moving upward past graffiti-covered walls illuminated by sparse green neon tubes. This ascent finally culminates at the top of the stairs, where the iconic green AFTERLIFE sign emerges to mark the entrance to the club.
